---
title: "Eveline Alicia Juliana Wallop, Countess of Portsmou"
---

## Eveline Alicia Juliana Wallop, Countess of Portsmou

**Dates:** (1834-1906)

**Maiden name:** (Herbert)

### Description

wife of the 5th Earl of Portsmouth, whom she married in 1855

### Letters

- Letter from May 10 1873

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
